enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a wide-ranging December 21, 2014 Boulder vlog while very high, covering his personal website project centered on a concept he calls 'rainbow crystal internet language' — a color-coded, numbered, grid-based system for organizing information. He also discusses his janitorial job, his geckos, upgrading to a Mac, listening to Herodotus audiobooks, and a lengthy meditation on how cannabis removes creative inhibitors and connects people to a bigger picture.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: his color-coded, numbered, grid-based web design language is the superior way to organize and navigate information on the internet
wasteful old technology; grid layout that shows everything at once is better
weed removes inhibitors and social barriers, giving creative people a direct connection to the big picture and the courage to do ambitious work
makes creative people smarter but only when there are barriers to break through; without barriers it just makes you stupid
laws and congressional bills should be organized in rainbow crystal language so citizens can see and confront hidden provisions
numbering every paragraph of every book makes navigation and memory dramatically easier
smoking high-THC flower is more economical than concentrates/hash oil at current Boulder prices

entities: The Bible / Apocrypha / Old Testament / New Testament

claims.subject: Martino Martin
claims.claim: Martino Martin is my number one fan for the last two years, sending the most video requests.

claims.subject: Randy
claims.claim: Randy suggested I should do a video last week.

claims.subject: December 21st
claims.claim: December 21st is the shortest day of the year and my mom's birthday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm doing triage like Charles Lindbergh, focusing on my work and throwing away extra stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My janitor job is fun and I get a little better each time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been smoking a lot of weed and absorbing audiobook content, especially biblical stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: My website's Bible section is the oldest part, started 10 years ago and never finished.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: I invented a new internet language called rainbow crystal internet language.

claims.subject: Rainbow crystal internet language
claims.claim: Rainbow crystal language fixes numbers from one to ten to colors of the rainbow.

claims.subject: Rainbow crystal internet language
claims.claim: The rainbow in my language starts light and goes dark, ending with a halo-like light purple.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: My website emulates nature with its rainbow crystal design.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: Color-coding your website makes you more developed, like being a 3D color guy in a black-and-white world.

claims.subject: Crystal concept
claims.claim: The crystal represents the power of 10, allowing zooming in and out of information like a microscope.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: Standardizing all Bibles on my website helps you see connections without changing how you perceive them.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: Each page on my website is numbered to show how big it is in terms of text and reading time.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: My website's design helps you remember where you are in a book by numbering paragraphs.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: I'm working on an aliens and Bible page to connect similar stories across different Bibles.

claims.subject: Kyle's geckos
claims.claim: I forgot to feed my geckos for like two or three weeks, and the crickets had babies.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: My new Mac is way better than my old $450 computer, handling more pages and crashing less.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: I redesigned my personal website after not looking at it since 2009.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: My website's layout is grid-based, utilizing every square centimeter of the screen.

claims.subject: Rainbow crystal internet language
claims.claim: Rainbow crystal language is about standardizing colors, fonts, and grid layouts for efficient information processing.

claims.subject: Crystal concept
claims.claim: Crystals are the perfect design for communication because they're symmetrical and tightly packed.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: My website's design lets you zoom in and out of information like the power of 10 video.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: Transparency in government could be achieved with my website's design, showing exactly how big laws are.

claims.subject: Kyle's weed
claims.claim: The weed I smoke now is like soft hash, super potent and expensive.

claims.subject: Weed effects
claims.claim: Weed makes you smarter by removing inhibitors, letting you latch onto ideas you'd normally dismiss.

claims.subject: Weed effects
claims.claim: Smoking weed shrinks the part of your brain that assesses consequences, explaining why stoners don't care.

claims.subject: Weed effects
claims.claim: Weed helps creative people by removing barriers and letting them see the big picture.

claims.subject: Weed history
claims.claim: Hemp was a major crop in history, but people didn't talk about getting high because they didn't need to break barriers.

claims.subject: Weed future
claims.claim: In the future, if creativity isn't suppressed, people might not need weed anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle's geckos
claims.claim: I built a little jungle gym for my geckos out of my fireplace.

claims.subject: Kyle's garden
claims.claim: I turned my fireplace into a garden with mirrors to make it look bigger.

claims.subject: Kyle's timeline
claims.claim: I have a history timeline book called 'Streams of Time' next to my fireplace.

claims.subject: Kyle's weed
claims.claim: The weed I have now is called 'Wide Out,' 22% THC, and it's like a rock.

claims.subject: Kyle's high
claims.claim: When I'm high, I feel like I'm in a sitcom, watching myself from a third-person perspective.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: My website's design lets you see the ratio of information, helping your brain hold more.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: I want to digitize all underground books with rainbow crystal language.

claims.subject: Kyle's high
claims.claim: Being high helps me do tedious work on my website without getting bored.

claims.subject: Kyle's high
claims.claim: When I'm high, I can daydream and work forever, tripping over audiobook content.
